---
title: "Lab 0 Part B"
author: "Thorax Hembleecker"
date: "20XX-01-22"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Why I Am Taking STAT 213

I am working towards a B.S. in computer science, and this is one of the options for required math courses. I never took stats in high school, so I figure I should give myself some familiarity with it.

```{r}
x = 3
x
x^2
x+5
```

$$
\sum_{i=1}^n \left(\frac{x_i^2}{3+i}\right)\\
\sigma^2+3\times\beta
$$

```{r importData}
mydata = read.csv("energy.csv")
```

```{r readData}
head(mydata) # head() prints out the first six lines of the dataset
mean(mydata$Year)
quantity = mydata$Quantity
mean(quantity)
```
